source_pr.title: coprocessor: fix data race for tiflash work index in region cache
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #19353

Problem Summary: found the data race in https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/46260/pipeline

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: operate TiFlashWorkIndex by `atomic`.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- fix data race for tiflash work index in region cache

evidence: synchronizes/avoids concurrent access to tiflash work index in region cache (store/tikv/region_cache.go).
